# EcoSapien

## About
EcoSapien is an organization that develops AI-powered solutions for sustainable environmental impact. We combine advanced machine learning with environmental data analytics to create tools that transform how organizations approach sustainability challenges.

## Website
https://www.ecosapien.de

## Source Code
https://github.com/eco-sapien/site

## Contact
shubham@ecosapien.de

## Focus Areas
- AI-powered sustainability solutions
- Sustainable dairy operations and environmental impact research
- Milk yield optimization across cattle breeds using organic fodder analysis
- Animal health monitoring with real-time surveillance systems
- Milk quality compositional analysis
- Genomic tracking and AI-assisted breeding selection
- Environmental impact assessment of waste management and soil quality
- Machine learning for sustainable business expansion planning
- Data-driven resource management for feed, water, and waste

## Technologies
- Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning
- Environmental Data Analytics
- Genomic Analysis
- Real-time Monitoring Systems

## Key Metrics
- 100+ cattle monitored
- 8 breed analysis programs
- Real-time health tracking systems

## License
MIT License - Open source
